content:
🚀 monty | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Safely executing AI-generated Python code within an agent or application, providing a controlled and efficient sandbox.
✨ Key Features: • Minimal and secure Python interpreter in Rust • Fast startup times (<1μs) • Controlled execution with resource limits (memory, stack, time) • Blocks host environment access (filesystem, env, network) by default • Allows controlled external function calls
📖 Summary: Monty is a minimal and secure Python interpreter written in Rust, designed to safely execute Python code generated by AI agents. It offers fast startup times and controlled execution, avoiding the overhead of containerized sandboxes.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
